briefs.title: BC Parks campsite fees raised and non-resident surcharge introduced, effective January 30
briefs.summary: BC Parks Recreation User Fees Regulation amended to raise campsite and day-use fee ceilings and add a new $5–$30 per-use surcharge on non-residents of British Columbia.
briefs.action_required: Update pricing displays and booking systems to reflect new fee ranges and non-resident surcharges.

key_dates.label: BC Parks Recreation User Fees Regulation amendments take effect

briefs.industries: Hotel & Accommodation, Natural Resources, Transportation & Logistics
